info.name: LMS — Homework (v1)
info.description:
Homework APIs for the student/teacher app.

## Teacher
- **POST `/homework/upload`** — create homework (optionally with a file). `multipart/form-data` when a `file` is attached, JSON otherwise.
- **POST `/homework/get`** — the teacher's OWN homework, defaulting to the last 15 days (override with `days`, or pass an exact `date`).
- **GET `/homework/get/{id}`** — single homework.
- **POST `/homework/update/{id}`** — update (optionally replace the file via multipart).
- **DELETE `/homework/delete/{id}`** — delete.

## Student
- **POST `/homework/student`** — homework for the student's class (last 15 days by default).

Each homework row is returned in a flat shape: `id, title, description, subject{id,name,code}, standard, section, assigned_by, assigned_date, assigned_time, days_ago, file_url, file_type`.

The class/section/subject options a teacher can post to come from **GET `/teacher/classes-subjects`** (see the Marks collection).

Auth: Sanctum bearer token in `authToken`.

request.description:
Create homework for one (class, section, subject). Required: `standard_id`, `section_id`, `subject_id`, `title` (or legacy `name`). Optional `description` and `file`.

A **teacher** may only post to a (class, section, subject) assigned to them in the **timetable** (the same triples returned by `GET /teacher/classes-subjects`) — otherwise **403**. The homework lands on its creation day and is visible to the teacher and to every student of that class+section.

Send as `multipart/form-data` when attaching a file; a plain JSON body works when there's no file. **422** on validation failure.

The authenticated teacher's own homework. Defaults to the last 15 days; override with `days`, or pass `date` (`Y-m-d`) for a single day. Optional filters: `search`, `standard_id`, `section_id`, `subject_id`, `per_page`.

Returns `{ homeworks[], pagination }`.
One homework by id (scoped to the caller's organization). **404** if not found.

formdata.description: Optional — include to replace the attachment.

request.description: Update a homework's fields; only the fields you send change. Include `file` to replace the attachment. **404** if not found.
Delete a homework by id. **404** if not found.

Homework assigned to the authenticated student's class (standard + section). Defaults to the last 15 days; override with `days`, or `from_date`/`to_date`. Optional filters: `search`, `subject_id`, `per_page`.

Returns `{ student_info, homeworks[], pagination, summary }`. **404** if the caller has no student profile.
